German Chancellor Friedrich Merz makes appeal to AfD voters
articles.description: Germany's chancellor has insisted that his coalition has "regained its footing" — despite dismal poll numbers. Friedrich Merz also cautioned against voting for the far-right AfD party.

articles.title: No support for Jews fleeing Nazi Germany at Evian conference
articles.description: In July 1938, a conference was held in Evian, France, to address the issue of Jews being persecuted by the Nazis in Germany and Austria. Almost nobody in the world was willing to take them in as refugees.

articles.title: Die zehn dunklen Tage von Evian
articles.description: Im Juli 1938 fand im französischen Evian eine internationale Konferenz statt. Es ging um das Schicksal jüdischer Flüchtlinge aus Deutschland und Österreich. Fast niemand auf der Welt war bereit, sie aufzunehmen.

articles.title: Ukraine : Verteidigungsminister Mychajlo Fedorow tritt zurück
England vs. Argentina: A football rivalry full of history
articles.description: From the Falkland Islands to Diego Maradona and David Beckham, there is so much history between the two 2026 World Cup semifinalists.

articles.title: Running dry: How to store more groundwater for dry seasons
articles.description: More frequent weather extremes are leading to water shortages during droughts and flooding during heavy rain. But groundwater storage can help secure water for dry seasons while mitigating extreme rain.

articles.title: Why Indonesia's economy is under pressure
articles.description: Southeast Asia's largest economy risks losing its emerging-market status as President Prabowo Subianto's spending plans rattle markets. Can he deliver growth?

articles.title: Why is Zelenskyy reshuffling Ukraine's government?
articles.description: Ukraine's Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko has resigned, prompting a Cabinet reshuffle led by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy. What comes next?

articles.title: 150 years of the Bayreuth Festival: Confronting a troubled legacy
articles.description: Should the past be confronted — or avoided? Why the Wagner festival's handling of its Nazi-era legacy remains a contentious issue in its 150th anniversary year.

articles.title: Putschversuch von 2016: Die Nacht, die die Türkei veränderte
articles.description: Vor zehn Jahren versuchten Teile der türkischen Armee, die Erdogan-Regierung zu stürzen. Die Folgen des gescheiterten Putsches prägen die Türkei bis heute. Ein Rückblick.
